title: mertensia iguanea
intro: Mertensia iguanea, also known as bluebells or lungwort, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the borage family. Native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia, it has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is rich in expectorant and antitussive compounds, which have been used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, providing relief from congestion and inflammation. Herbal preparations, including infusions and tinctures, are commonly used to harness the plant's health benefits, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties.
